name: Kamar Vintage
signature: A page-wide sepia grain and vignette over everything, a shimmering art-deco sunburst marking the hero like a 1920s film title card, couple photos in tilted taped polaroids, a film-projector flicker transition on cover open, brass corner ornaments on every card, and a maximized three-layer field of floating + parallaxed vintage ephemera (film reels, sunburst fans, pocket watches) across all 14 sections.
brief: Old-world romantic vintage elevated to cinematic art-deco luxury — feels like a found photograph album brought to life as a 1920s film title card, not a flat digital page. Includes the full standard section set (Susunan Acara with icons, Dress Code, Hashtag & Instagram, quick-nav, auto-scroll, per-section background photos).
